name.description: A descriptive name for the API key.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization the user API key is associated with. The user must have an active membership in this organization.

permissions.description: The permission slugs to assign to the API key. Each permission must be enabled for user API keys.

expires_at.description: The timestamp when the API key should expire. Must be a future timestamp. If omitted, the key does not expire.
